fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 67 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which incorrectly considers an item valid when the current time is exactly equal to its expiry time. It should use a greater-than-or-equal-to comparison (`>=`) to correctly expire items at the boundary.

constraints.intent: An item at the exact expiry boundary should be considered expired, not valid.
A payload should only be returned if the current time is strictly before the expiry time.
The TTL timestamp extracted from the cache must be non-negative.
